positive: A mesmerizing celestial botanical illustration. Focus on a central, highly detailed arrangement featuring bioluminescent giant lotus flowers, intertwining with delicate, crystalline vines and glowing nebula dust. The style is highly detailed vector art mixed with deep space watercolor textures. Composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed for a repeating print pattern, featuring bold silhouettes against a gradient backdrop of deep indigo, electric violet, and midnight blue. Strong contrast is key, with luminous highlights (cyan and neon magenta) popping against the dark, cosmic palette. Cinematic, intricate, high resolution, sticker style, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermarks, low resolution, fuzzy, artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, jpeg artifacts, amateur, signature, logo, cropped, signature
